allow: Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:5000/api/chat -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{""message"":""I lost my phone"",""language"":""en-IN"",""history"":[]}')

Bash(python -c "import google.generativeai as genai; import os; from dotenv import load_dotenv; load_dotenv\(\); genai.configure\(api_key=os.getenv\(''GEMINI_API_KEY''\)\); models = genai.list_models\(\); print\(''Available models:''\); [print\(f''- {m.name}''\) for m in models if ''generateContent'' in m.supported_generation_methods]")
Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:5000/api/chat -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{""message"":""I lost my mobile phone yesterday"",""language"":""en-IN"",""history"":[]}')

Bash(curl -k -m 30 -X POST https://localhost:5000/api/chat -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{""""message"""":""""My phone was stolen"""",""""language"""":""""en-IN"""",""""history"""":[{""""role"""":""""user"""",""""parts"""":[{""""text"""":""""test""""}]},{""""role"""":""""model"""",""""parts"""":[{""""text"""":""""hello""""}]}]}')
Bash(python -c "from sarvamai import SarvamAI; import inspect; print\(inspect.signature\(SarvamAI.__init__\)\)")
Bash(python -c "from sarvamai import SarvamAI; client = SarvamAI\(\); print\(type\(client.chat\)\); print\(dir\(client.chat\)\)")
Bash(python -c "import os; os.environ[''SARVAM_API_KEY''] = ''test''; from sarvamai import SarvamAI; client = SarvamAI\(\); print\(type\(client.chat\)\)")
Bash(python -c "import os; os.environ[''SARVAM_API_KEY''] = ''test''; from sarvamai import SarvamAI; client = SarvamAI\(\); print\([m for m in dir\(client.chat\) if not m.startswith\(''_''\)]\)")

Bash(python -c "import os; os.environ[''SARVAM_API_KEY''] = ''test''; from sarvamai import SarvamAI; client = SarvamAI\(\); print\(type\(client.chat.completions\)\); print\([m for m in dir\(client.chat.completions\) if not m.startswith\(''_''\)]\)")
